name: Crab Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked and drained fettuccine in a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet; sauté mushrooms in butter until just tender.
3. Add garlic salt, green onion, parsley, and basil to the mushrooms; sauté for 1 minute.
4. Spoon the mushroom mixture over the fettuccine.
5. Drain the crab meat and arrange it on top of the vegetables.
6. Melt the remaining butter in the skillet; gradually add flour.
7. Gradually stir in chicken broth, stirring constantly until smooth and thickened.
8. Add white wine and continue to cook, stirring constantly, until smooth and thickened.
9. Stir in grated Parmesan cheese until it melts.
10. Pour the sauce over the crab meat.
11. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes.
